hero.title: Specialists in machining technology, metal and alloy welding
hero.subtitle: We believe that high-quality engineering is not only about technology, but above all about approach.

home.introParagraph1: We believe that high-quality engineering is not only about technology, but above all about approach. For us, every project is a commitment to deliver a solution that is functional, reliable, and ready to perform in real operation.
home.introParagraph2: We focus on custom manufacturing of metal structures, components, and technological units. We execute orders through the full production process, from technical design through manufacturing to final assembly. This allows us to ensure a smooth project workflow and a result that meets expectations as well as demanding technical requirements.
home.introParagraph3: The foundation of our work is open communication, flexibility, and reliability. We listen to customer needs and seek solutions that make sense not only on paper, but above all in practice. We believe that long-term cooperation is built where quality work, trust, and fair dealing come together.

production.title: Engineering Production
production.subtitle: Our company is engaged in comprehensive engineering production from A to Z.

machines.title: Manufacture of Machine Units
machines.description: We manufacture machines and technological equipment that will become a reliable part of your operations. We focus on precise execution and functionality.

series.title: Single-piece and Series Production
series.description: We carry out high-quality custom production of individual parts and repeated series. We can effectively respond to the specific requirements and deadlines of your projects.

renovation.title: Renovation of Spare Parts
renovation.description: We bring worn parts of machines and equipment back to life for heavy industry. Through targeted renovation we save your costs on purchasing new parts and minimise production downtime. Every part undergoes thorough inspection to meet the parameters of the original.

complete.title: Complete Production from A–Z
complete.description: We take care of the logistics between suppliers. From purchasing raw material, through precise machining and surface treatment, to final assembly and testing.

piping.title: Piping Systems & Energy
piping.description: We specialise in the manufacture and installation of piping routes and components for the energy sector.

welding.title: Welding
welding.description: We offer professional welding using MIG/MAG, TIG and electrode methods. Our experienced welders guarantee high strength and aesthetic cleanliness of welds in structural parts and pressure vessels, always with emphasis on precision according to documentation.

engineering.title: Engineering Services
engineering.description: Our work does not end at manufacturing. We prepare complete production documentation and proposals for optimising production processes. We help you streamline processes and find solutions that save time, reduce costs and minimise material consumption.

equipment.title: Technological Capabilities
equipment.subtitle: Overview of our machinery and technological capacity.
equipment.intro: We have the following machinery on our premises. In the event of capacity constraints or order size, together with our partner companies we are able to provide these services according to technological capabilities:

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.description: Our company is built on quality and professionalism, as evidenced by the certifications we have earned. They are not only a confirmation of our expertise but also a commitment to continuous improvement and adherence to the highest standards. Thanks to them you can be sure that our products and services meet strict requirements for quality and precision.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.subtitle: Do you have a question or need a quote? We are happy to advise you on all your projects.

references.title: References
references.subtitle: What we can manufacture and where our products go.

productions.energy: Manufacture of energy components – heat exchangers, tube sheets, piping
productions.buckets: Manufacture of tipping buckets, blades, hardox crushers and hoppers
productions.assembly: Manufacture and assembly of technological units

production.title: Engineering Production

equipment.title: Technological Capabilities
equipment.description: Overview of machinery and technological capacity of RUPAS METAL. CNC machining, MIG/MAG and TIG welding, and more.

certifications.title: Certifications
